item.title: Staying closed by choice
item.description: In a market where every sale counts, Chevy Dude explains why some dealerships choose to stay closed. What does this decision reveal about dealer strategy?

media:content.media:title: Staying closed by choice
media:content.media:description: In a market where every sale counts, Chevy Dude explains why some dealerships choose to stay closed. What does this decision reveal about dealer strategy?

item.title: Carfax’s New Feature: Smart Move or Not?
item.description: Carfax rolls out a new tool for buyers, but is it truly helpful or just hype? What impact could this feature have on your next car purchase?

media:content.media:title: Carfax’s New Feature: Smart Move or Not?
media:content.media:description: Carfax rolls out a new tool for buyers, but is it truly helpful or just hype? What impact could this feature have on your next car purchase?

item.title: What Car Shopping Sites May Leave Out
item.description: Convenience comes at a cost—many car shopping sites skip key details like inspections, fees, and dealer tactics. What crucial info might you be missing before you buy?

media:content.media:title: What Car Shopping Sites May Leave Out
media:content.media:description: Convenience comes at a cost—many car shopping sites skip key details like inspections, fees, and dealer tactics. What crucial info might you be missing before you buy?

item.title: What Car Shopping Sites May Leave Out
item.description: Chevy Dude explains why some car shopping websites may not show the full picture.

item.title: Chevy Dude on the New Car Market
item.description: Prices, demand, and dealer tactics—Chevy Dude breaks down today’s new car market. What trends should buyers watch before stepping onto the lot?

media:content.media:title: Chevy Dude on the New Car Market

item.title: Dealer Reviews
item.description: Another round of dealership reviews exposes the good, the bad, and the downright shocking. What red flags or hidden gems show up this time?
